project_description: Built a Spotify-inspired music app with playlist browsing, audio playback, and a responsive UI using modern front-end technologies.
ShopIN is a remote user platform that help user to add product to cart and and purchase and explore log in log out functionality and many other features
Developed using MERN Stack, Redux Toolkit, and Socket.IO for fast, interactive, and scalable social networking.
